title: festuca geniculata subsp. attenuata
intro: Festuca geniculata subsp. attenuata, also known as bent or weak fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Festuca geniculata subsp. attenuata can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
